metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace publishing the grok-plugin-cc Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: grok
plugins.description: Use xAI's Grok from Claude Code: ask, review, adversarial-review, imagine, imagine-video, and long-form rescue via subagent. Wraps the local `grok` CLI (xAI Grok Build) with env scrubbing, ANSI sanitization, capability probing, and an optional stop-time review gate.
